Apply NowFind a Coach→
Level 3 | Senior

Sage

A sage is not someone with all the answers, but someone whose presence helps others find their own. Over 90 hours of one-to-one work with a master coach, you move from doing coaching to being a coach.

Who this level is for

  • Architect coaches seeking genuine mastery
  • Senior and executive coaches working with demanding clients
  • Coaches ready to specialise and build real authority

Entry requirements

Hold the ICI Architect credential and demonstrate a substantial body of coaching practice.

Format and hours

Delivered entirely online and one-to-one with a master coach. Your 90 hours are structured as:

  • 30 hours of one-to-one online coaching and advanced supervision with a master coach
  • 60 hours of guided self-work and research, including case work and a specialism portfolio
  • Total: 90 hours

What you will learn to do

  • Sit with the most complex clients with depth and presence
  • Work with power, ego, fear and the inner life
  • Coach for transformation, not just improvement
  • Bring a presence that cannot be faked
  • Develop your own coaching philosophy and model

Syllabus

The syllabus integrates the deeper psychology, leadership application and contemplative grounding that distinguish a senior coach.

Module 1: Mastery of presence

Coaching from being, not doing. The quality of attention that lets a client say the thing they have never said aloud. Practised, not just discussed.

Module 2: The deeper psychology

Shadow, projection, transference and counter-transference as they actually show up in coaching. Working with them ethically and to the client's benefit, while staying firmly within scope.

Module 3: Executive and leadership coaching at depth

Coaching power without being captured by it. Ego, fear, isolation at senior levels, and high-stakes decisions.

Module 4: Systems and relational coaching

Seeing the client inside their web of relationships and systems. Coaching teams, stakeholders and dynamics rather than isolated individuals.

Module 5: Contemplative practice and behavioural science

Bringing reflective and contemplative traditions into dialogue with modern behavioural science, so depth and rigour reinforce each other.

Module 6: Coaching the whole person

Meaning, identity, values and life transitions. Working with the questions clients bring when surface goals turn out to be about something larger.

Module 7: Advanced ethics and complex cases

The grey areas. Dual relationships, confidentiality under pressure, and the judgement to navigate situations no checklist covers.

Module 8: Building authority

Mentoring, thought leadership and contribution. Beginning to give back to the field, which is the bridge to Luminary.

Assessment

Assessment at Sage level is rigorous and personal. You demonstrate depth, range and presence across a portfolio of supervised coaching work.

What you graduate with

  • The ICI Sage Coach credential and the ICI-S post-nominal
  • Recognised seniority and the fees that come with it
  • A defined specialism and a portfolio that proves it
  • Eligibility to begin the Luminary pathway

Details at a glance

  • Level
    3 of 4 (Senior)
  • Format
    online, one-to-one
  • Hours
    90 Hours
  • Suggested duration
    up to 6 months
Apply for Sage Speak to an Advisor

The International Coaching Institute trains and certifies coaches one-to-one, online, blending coaching craft with leadership, psychology, neuroscience and human behaviour. Become the coach people trust.
